name: Baked Salmon in Redwine and Onion Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs salmon filet, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook for 10 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the red wine and simmer until almost all the liquid has evaporated.
4. Season with sugar, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Place the salmon filet in a baking dish.
6. Add the remaining red wine and cream to the dish.
7. Sprinkle with additional salt and pepper.
8. Bake at 475°F (245°C) for 7 minutes until the salmon is cooked through.
9. Remove the salmon from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes.
10. Reduce the liquid in the pot over low heat until it reaches a syrup consistency.
11. Adjust seasoning as needed.
12. Spoon some onion marmalade on top of the salmon.
13. Drizzle the sauce over the salmon and serve.
